channel.title: Babak Salimi's Home Page

item.title: HypDB
item.description: DSC 100: Introduction to Data Managment Description Databases are at the heart of modern commercial application development. Their use extends beyond this to many other environments and domains where large amounts of data must be stored for efficient update, retrieval, and analysis. The purpose of this course is to provide a comprehensive introduction to the use of management systems for applications. Some of the topics covered are the following: data models, query languages, transactions, data cleaning, and database as a service.
